NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE JURY FEES AND EXPENSES PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WARREN, WILLIAM

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-31-2017 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF WILLIAM WARREN'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION WITHOUT PREJUDICE DUE TO INSUFFICIENT INFORMATION AS TO JURY FEES, COURT-APPOINTED INTERPRETER FEES FOR A WITNESS,FEESFOR A PEACE OFFICER TO TESTIFY IN COURT, FEES FOR COURT-APPOINTED EXPERTS, AND FEES FOR COURTCALL. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
